name: Obian Advisory Board (Kastner as Aberdeen Senior VP, Pre-Obian Employment)
description: Obian Group's advisory board page (obian.com/board.shtml) naming Peter Kastner as 'Senior VP of Research, Aberdeen Group' among its advisors. Date approximated to ~August 2004 based on the most recent featured article ('Obian Viewpoint 03Aug04'). Documents the pre-employment advisory relationship that preceded Kastner's later move to Obian. Other advisors include Barry Kadets (CIO Bacou-Dalloz), Bob Lutz (Director of IT, Timex), Tom McCoy (former CIO AIG), Lawrence Meador (former CIO Cigna P&C), Ken Schwaber (Advanced Development Methods), and Patrick Zilvitis (CIO Segway, former CIO Gillette).
